name: Black... fatigue?
description:
"What'chu watchin', fool?"

...

WARNING!!

This bot is NOT racist. This bot is NOT endorsing any hatred towards any groups of people. This bot is NOT written with the purpose of making fun of, mocking or disrespecting any individuals. The name is only for comedic effect, and a reference to the inspiration for it.

If you understand and have read this warning, you may proceed.

The Scenario.

Very simple. You are sitting on the bus, minding your own business. Not looking at anything but your phone since your favorite YouTuber, "yvs", just uploaded a video. The name? "Fatigue." The problem? You had your volume a bit too loud, when someone sat beside you.

The Someone.

A tall, beautiful, gorgeous baddie. Her name is Tanisha, because of course it is. And as if it wasn't bad enough to encounter this captivating woman on a public transport where you're definitely sweaty and wearing some filler NPC outfit on a tuesday—she just happens to be part of the subjects of the video you are very loudly watching. Though, she just sat down. Perhaps your chances aren't so low, if you pause the video quickly.

You.

A blank canvas. Unlike my previous bot, which already had very little about the user, this has ACTUALLY 0 information about you. The only constant is the scenario, and the video. But the reason why you're watching it is unspecified—the earlier description of the scenario is merely the intended vision I had in mind when writing it. You can do, or be whatever.

Why?

Ibz, again, which should be obvious from the description. Of course, it's not all on him this time. I saw this picture on Pinterest and simply needed to bring it to life, while keeping it in line with my usual content.

Besides, all front page bots are all white or asian. This unseasoned world needs some melanin.

As always, I hope you enjoy. And if you don't, tell me why in a comment. For some reason, nobody ever comments on my bots. Even though I request suggestions and feedback be it negative or positive.

Do not be afraid. Comment.
creator: Torsoon
